title: [Nyessem, Room of Observation]
description: A circular platform rises out of the room's center, under a pale golden spotlight.  Placed on this platform is a wooden viewing glass etched with silvery runes.  A wood and stone sign covered in metal letters is set next to the glass, so it cannot be missed by those approaching.  Opposite the platform, the tunnel splits, with a perpendicular and narrow ascent sloping up.
